ecosystemBackend.name: bapX ecosystem backend
ecosystemBackend.dataStore: JSON files with documented JSON Schema
ecosystemBackend.policy: Do not use bapXvm as the primary bapx.in ecosystem backend. Build a first-party Node.js/TypeScript backend with JSON-first records, schemas, file indexes, maps, workflow state, users, OAuth, and billing contracts. SQL/vector systems can exist only behind generated JSON contracts if they are ever introduced later.

billingProviders.name: Razorpay
billingProviders.scope: India-first subscriptions, invoices, payment links, customer billing state, webhook reconciliation, and admin billing review.
